🔗 Connect Google Sheets

Paste your published CSV link or your Sheet ID — both work.

Option A — Published CSV URL
File → Share → Publish to web → select tab → Comma-separated values → Publish → copy the full URL

Option B — Sheet ID + tab name
Copy the ID from your browser URL between /d/ and /edit, then enter the tab name below

💡 Best: make the sheet public (Anyone with link → Viewer). Sheet ID + API key is most reliable, but the dashboard can also try loading tabs via CSV without an API key.
⟳ Connecting…

📋 Manual CSV Paste

Your browser is blocking the automatic connection (GitHub Pages security policy). Here's how to load your data in 3 steps:

Step 1: Open your published CSV URL in a new tab:

Step 2: Select all the text on that page (Ctrl+A / Cmd+A) and copy it (Ctrl+C / Cmd+C)

Step 3: Paste it in the box below and click Load
